golden_provenance: golden.mlmodel is the Rust exporter's own output for model.cbm, produced by running `cargo test -p cb-model --test coreml_export_test` once with CB_COREML_REGEN_GOLDEN=1 (NOT by this Python script). Frozen thereafter; regenerate deliberately only on a schema change.
note: FROZEN. CatBoost quantization is run-to-run nondeterministic; never regenerate at test time. structure.json is the CM-04 oracle target.
